description: You are logged into wger fitness manager at http://localhost as admin (username: admin, password: adminadmin). Record a completed workout session for today's date linked to the '5x5 Beginner' routine. Include the note 'Solid squat session, nearly hit all reps' and an impression for the session. Log three sets for the 'Squats' exercise: Set 1 (100 kg, 5 reps), Set 2 (100 kg, 5 reps), and Set 3 (100 kg, 4 reps).

metadata.expected_notes: Solid squat session, nearly hit all reps
